g.text: A shadow passes overhead. Just Saturn, drifting across the sky.
Arrived at Crash Site. Food: 96% (-2) | Water: 94% (-3) | Suit: 99% (-0) | Battery: 62% (-7)
Tip: Use 'ship charging' to recharge your drone.
Your ship lies crumpled in a shallow crater, venting steam into the thin atmosphere. Debris is scattered across the ice.
No new locations found within scanner range.
No new signatures in range. Try moving to a different location.
Iyren helps install Ice Crystal into the ship!
Your companions can stay here or return home.
